enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual Sunday morning vlog recapping his Saturday, which he spent entirely indoors working on a 3D reconstruction of ancient Rome in Google Earth. He discusses his progress modeling the Circus Maximus, his pace of about one large building per day, and his use of Mike Duncan's History of Rome podcast as supplementary research. He also muses about how cool it would be if Rome had never been destroyed.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Deeply engaged and excited; wants to trace everything before building so the build phase is pure fun

stances.topic: Mike Duncan's History of Rome podcast
stances.position: Recommends it as great supplementary material; plans to listen again after finishing
Thinks it would have been amazing if Rome had never been destroyed and could be explored car-free today
Proud of going beyond existing models, e.g. including a water channel at Circus Maximus that others omitted
